rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN ROSENBLUETH VS. SARAH LILJEDAHL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF STEPHEN ROSENBLUETH's MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ THIS NOTIFICATION IN ITS ENTIRETY. Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. Department501ContestTR@sftc.org e-mail address shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment. Hearing Required. Plaintiff to produce the video referenced in the papers by no later than 8:30 am on June 25, 2020 to the Court and to the opposing party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SONDER USA INC. VS. TAYLOR JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 25, 2020 line 7. Cynthia Barclay, esq.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for DEFENDANT TAYLOR JOHNSON READ THIS NOTIFICATION IN ITS ENTIRETY. Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. Department501ContestTR@sftc.org e-mail address shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Defendant's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/CFH)
